abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Flawless Blades^^**

abilities.name: Duellist’s Hubris
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: A Challenge Worthy of Skill
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Character, Monster^^** or **^^Walker^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemonic Poisons
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player's Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
abilities.description: At the start of your opponent's Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Daemon Prince of Slaanesh section. Until the start of your opponent's next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.description: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Serpentine
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Perfectionists
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **^^[LETHAL HITS]^^** ability.

abilities.name: Euphoric Strikes
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does so, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Lord of the Host
abilities.description: If this model is attached to an **^^Emperor's Children Battleline^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Tormentors^^**

abilities.name: Eager to Prove
abilities.description: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Repulsed by Weakness
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster**^^ and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Proud and Vainglorious
abilities.description: You can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Slayer of Champions
abilities.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [^^Precision^^] ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character**^^ unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Faultless Opportunist
abilities.description: You can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP; and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Blinding Speed
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does so, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Distortion
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Rise to the Challenge
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer can fight one additional time. When doing so, you can select one ability using the Exquisite Swordsmanship Detachment rule to apply to those attacks.

abilities.name: Sublime Presence
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children Transport**^^ that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that **^^Transport**^^ on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Spearhead Striker
abilities.description: Each time the bearer disembarks from a **^^Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Accomplished Tactician
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, you can select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit within 9" of the bearer that was hit by one or more of those attacks, then select one friendly **^^Transport**^^ that unit is wholly within 6" of and is able to embark within. That **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit can embark in that **^^Transport**^^.

abilities.name: Heretek Adept
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **^^Emperor's Children Vehicle**^^ model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Pledge of Eternal Servitude
abilities.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, take a Leadership test for the bearer at the end of the phase. if that test is passed, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining (up to its Wounds characteristic).

abilities.name: Pledge of Dark Glory
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Pledge of Mortal Pain
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is Battle-shocked: if failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Pledge of Unholy Fortune
abilities.description: Once per turn, after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for a model in the bearer's unit, if the bearer is not Battle-shocked, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

abilities.name: Steeped in Suffering
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Musk
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Tactical Perfection
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to two **^^Emperor's Children**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Loathsome Dexterity
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Empyric Suffusion
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target one friendly **^^Slaanesh**^^ unit within 6" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Dark Blessings
abilities.description: Once per battle, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Possessed Blade
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer; add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon. In addition, each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, when resolving those attacks add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that weapon and that weapon has the [^^Devastating Wounds^^] and [^^Hazardous^^] abilities.

abilities.name: Warp Walker
abilities.description: Each time the bearer's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Soulstain Made Manifest
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Exalted Patron
abilities.description:
Add 1" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Flawless Blades^^** unit.

abilities.name: Spiritsliver
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Tears of the Phoenix
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

abilities.name: Dark Majesty
abilities.description: Improve this model's Leadership characteristic by 1 and its Objective Control characteristic by 2. At the end of the battle, if this model is within range of an objective marker you control that is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone, you gain 1 Rare ingredient.

abilities.name: Odious Grace
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Fickle Speed
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Whipcord Sinews
abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 2.

abilities.name: Razor Claws
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1. If this model destroys one or more units with a melee attack during a battle (excluding **^^Imperium^^** and **^^Chaos^^** units), then at the end of that battle you gain 1 Extract of Xeno-matter.

abilities.name: Psychotropic Aura
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Betentacled Limbs
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model. If this model destroys one or more **^^Chaos^^** units with a melee attack during a battle, then at the end of that battle you gain 1 Infusion of Traitor's Blood.

abilities.name: Perfection of the Body
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Silver Skin
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Emperor's Children Terminator Squad; Noise Marines^^**

abilities.name: Obsessive Annunciation
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Doom Siren

abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 2.

abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1. abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model. If this model destroys one or more **^^Chaos^^** units with a melee attack during a battle, then at the end of that battle you gain 1 Infusion of Traitor's Blood.

abilities.name: Perfection of the Body
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Lord of Excess
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Slaanesh Infantry^^**, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Excessive Vigour (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly **^^Slaanesh^^** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Ecstatic Death
abilities.description: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Eager to Prove
abilities.description: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Repulsed by Weakness
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster**^^ and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Proud and Vainglorious
abilities.description: You can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Slayer of Champions
abilities.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [^^Precision^^] ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character**^^ unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Faultless Opportunist
abilities.description: You can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP; and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Blinding Speed
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does so, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Distortion
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Rise to the Challenge
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer can fight one additional time. When doing so, you can select one ability using the Exquisite Swordsmanship Detachment rule to apply to those attacks.

abilities.name: Sublime Presence
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children Transport**^^ that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that **^^Transport**^^ on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Spearhead Striker
abilities.description: Each time the bearer disembarks from a **^^Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Accomplished Tactician
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, you can select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit within 9" of the bearer that was hit by one or more of those attacks, then select one friendly **^^Transport**^^ that unit is wholly within 6" of and is able to embark within. That **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit can embark in that **^^Transport**^^.

abilities.name: Heretek Adept
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **^^Emperor's Children Vehicle**^^ model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Pledge of Eternal Servitude
abilities.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, take a Leadership test for the bearer at the end of the phase. if that test is passed, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining (up to its Wounds characteristic).

abilities.name: Pledge of Dark Glory
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Pledge of Mortal Pain
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is Battle-shocked: if failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Pledge of Unholy Fortune
abilities.description: Once per turn, after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for a model in the bearer's unit, if the bearer is not Battle-shocked, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

abilities.name: Steeped in Suffering
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Musk
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Tactical Perfection
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to two **^^Emperor's Children**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Loathsome Dexterity
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Empyric Suffusion
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target one friendly **^^Slaanesh**^^ unit within 6" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Dark Blessings
abilities.description: Once per battle, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Possessed Blade
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer; add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon. In addition, each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, when resolving those attacks add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that weapon and that weapon has the [^^Devastating Wounds^^] and [^^Hazardous^^] abilities.

abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster**^^ and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. abilities.description: You can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Faultless Opportunist
abilities.description: You can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP; and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Blinding Speed
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does so, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Distortion
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Rise to the Challenge
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer can fight one additional time. When doing so, you can select one ability using the Exquisite Swordsmanship Detachment rule to apply to those attacks.

abilities.name: Sublime Presence
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children Transport**^^ that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that **^^Transport**^^ on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Spearhead Striker
abilities.description: Each time the bearer disembarks from a **^^Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Accomplished Tactician
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, you can select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit within 9" of the bearer that was hit by one or more of those attacks, then select one friendly **^^Transport**^^ that unit is wholly within 6" of and is able to embark within. That **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit can embark in that **^^Transport**^^.

abilities.name: Heretek Adept

abilities.name: Pledge of Eternal Servitude
abilities.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, take a Leadership test for the bearer at the end of the phase. if that test is passed, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining (up to its Wounds characteristic).

abilities.name: Pledge of Dark Glory
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Pledge of Mortal Pain
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is Battle-shocked: if failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Pledge of Unholy Fortune
abilities.description: Once per turn, after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for a model in the bearer's unit, if the bearer is not Battle-shocked, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

abilities.name: Steeped in Suffering

abilities.name: Intoxicating Musk

abilities.name: Tactical Perfection
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to two **^^Emperor's Children**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Loathsome Dexterity

abilities.name: Dark Blessings

abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model. If this model destroys one or more **^^Chaos^^** units with a melee attack during a battle, then at the end of that battle you gain 1 Infusion of Traitor's Blood.

abilities.name: Perfection of the Body
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Silver Skin
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Emperor's Children Terminator Squad.**^^

abilities.name: Doom Siren
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry**^^ unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy unit suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Feverish Butchery
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Obsessive Denunciation
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abilities.name: Perfectionists
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Lethal Hits^^] ability.

abilities.name: Sickening Stimulation
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed model (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to that unit.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.description: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding ^^**Titanic**^^ models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Revel in Desecration
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is not below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Dark Majesty
abilities.description: Improve this model's Leadership characteristic by 1 and its Objective Control characteristic by 2. At the end of the battle, if this model is within range of an objective marker you control that is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone, you gain 1 Rare ingredient.

abilities.name: Odious Grace
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Fickle Speed
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Whipcord Sinews
abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 2.

abilities.name: Razor Claws
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1. If this model destroys one or more units with a melee attack during a battle (excluding **^^Imperium^^** and **^^Chaos^^** units), then at the end of that battle you gain 1 Extract of Xeno-matter.

abilities.name: Psychotropic Aura
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Betentacled Limbs
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model. If this model destroys one or more **^^Chaos^^** units with a melee attack during a battle, then at the end of that battle you gain 1 Infusion of Traitor's Blood.

abilities.name: Perfection of the Body
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Silver Skin
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

enhancements.name: Eager to Prove
enhancements.description: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Repulsed by Weakness
enhancements.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster**^^ and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

enhancements.name: Proud and Vainglorious
enhancements.description: You can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Slayer of Champions
enhancements.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [^^Precision^^] ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character**^^ unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Faultless Opportunist
enhancements.description: You can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP; and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Blinding Speed
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does so, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Distortion
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Rise to the Challenge
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer can fight one additional time. When doing so, you can select one ability using the Exquisite Swordsmanship Detachment rule to apply to those attacks.

enhancements.name: Sublime Presence
enhancements.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children Transport**^^ that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that **^^Transport**^^ on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Spearhead Striker
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer disembarks from a **^^Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Accomplished Tactician
enhancements.description: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, you can select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit within 9" of the bearer that was hit by one or more of those attacks, then select one friendly **^^Transport**^^ that unit is wholly within 6" of and is able to embark within. That **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit can embark in that **^^Transport**^^.

enhancements.name: Heretek Adept
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **^^Emperor's Children Vehicle**^^ model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Pledge of Eternal Servitude
enhancements.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, take a Leadership test for the bearer at the end of the phase. if that test is passed, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining (up to its Wounds characteristic).

enhancements.name: Pledge of Dark Glory
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Pledge of Mortal Pain
enhancements.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is Battle-shocked: if failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Pledge of Unholy Fortune
enhancements.description: Once per turn, after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for a model in the bearer's unit, if the bearer is not Battle-shocked, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

enhancements.name: Steeped in Suffering
enhancements.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Intoxicating Musk
enhancements.description: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Tactical Perfection
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to two **^^Emperor's Children**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Loathsome Dexterity
enhancements.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

enhancements.name: Empyric Suffusion
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, you can target one friendly **^^Slaanesh**^^ unit within 6" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Dark Blessings
enhancements.description: Once per battle, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Possessed Blade
enhancements.description: At the start of the battle, select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer; add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon. In addition, each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, when resolving those attacks add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that weapon and that weapon has the [^^Devastating Wounds^^] and [^^Hazardous^^] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warp Walker
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

enhancements.name: Soulstain Made Manifest
enhancements.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Exalted Patron
enhancements.description:
Add 1" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Flawless Blades^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Spiritsliver
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Tears of the Phoenix
enhancements.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and Wound roll.
